title: add index lead to inconsistent index data.
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

deploy tidb:

```
tiup playground v6.1.0 --host 0.0.0.0
```



schema and initial data:

```sql
drop table if exists table1;
create table table1 (pkId integer, pkAttr0 integer, col double(10,2), primary key(pkAttr0) NONCLUSTERED) PARTITION BY HASH(pkAttr0)  PARTITIONS 4 ;

insert into table1 values ("0","3","76202.0");
insert into table1 values ("1","5","73328.0");
insert into table1 values ("2","11","73328.0");
insert into table1 values ("3","16","48796.0");
insert into table1 values ("4","20","94869.0");
insert into table1 values ("5","28","55722.0");
```



| Txn1                                           | Txn2                                                    | session3                                                     | session4                                                   | session5                                                     |
| :------------------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------- |
| begin;                                       |                                                       | alter table table1 modify col double(12, 3) null; (parallel execute) | alter table table1 add index idx1(col); (parallel execute) | alter table table1 change col col double(10, 2); (parallel execute) |
|                                              | begin;                                                |                                                              |                                                            |                                                              |
| select pkId from table1 where col = 55722.0; |                                                       |                                                              |                                                            |                                                              |
|                                              | update table1 set col = 90 where ( pkAttr0  =  28  ); | -- return ok                                                 | -- return ok                                               | -- return ok                                                 |
| commit; -- ok                                |                                                       |                                                              |                                                            |                                                              |
|                                              | commit; -- ok                                         |                                                              |                                                            |                                                              |



### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

After all workloads:

```sql
mysql> select * from table1 order by pkId;
+------+---------+------+
| pkId | pkAttr0 | col  |
+------+---------+------+
|    0 |       3 | NULL |
|    1 |       5 | NULL |
|    2 |      11 | NULL |
|    3 |      16 | NULL |
|    4 |      20 | NULL |
|    5 |      28 | NULL |
+------+---------+------+
6 rows in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select * from table1 force index(idx1) order by pkId;
-- same with the below

mysql> select count(*) from table1;
+----------+
| count(*) |
+----------+
|        6 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select count(*) from table1 force index(idx1);
-- same with the below
```



### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

After all workloads:

```sql
mysql> select * from table1 order by pkId;
+------+---------+------+
| pkId | pkAttr0 | col  |
+------+---------+------+
|    0 |       3 | NULL |
|    1 |       5 | NULL |
|    2 |      11 | NULL |
|    3 |      16 | NULL |
|    4 |      20 | NULL |
|    5 |      28 | NULL |
+------+---------+------+
6 rows in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select * from table1 force index(idx1) order by pkId;
+------+---------+------+
| pkId | pkAttr0 | col  |
+------+---------+------+
|    0 |       3 | NULL |
|    1 |       5 | NULL |
|    2 |      11 | NULL |
+------+---------+------+
3 rows in set (0.01 sec)

mysql> select count(*) from table1;
+----------+
| count(*) |
+----------+
|        6 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select count(*) from table1 force index(idx1);
+----------+
| count(*) |
+----------+
|        3 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)


mysql> admin check table table1;
ERROR 8223 (HY000): data inconsistency in table: table1, index: idx1, handle: 4, index-values:"" != record-values:"handle: 4, values: [KindNull <nil>]"
```



### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

TiDB v6.1.0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT DEFAULT NULL CHECK (age >= 0));
SELECT * FROM table2 WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: alter table add index during parallel execution
